mapper.sql: course_id, course_name, course_type, cover_image, description, price, points_price, creator_type, creator_id, maic_source_id, audit_status, status, visible_scope, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_course SET course_name = #{courseName}, course_type = #{courseType}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, points_price = #{pointsPrice,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creator_type = #{creatorType}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, maic_source_id = #{maicSourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visible_scope = #{visibleScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE jst_course SET audit_status = #{targetAuditStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND audit_status = #{expectedAuditStatus} AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE jst_course SET status = #{targetStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT course_id, course_name, course_type, cover_image, description, price, points_price, creator_type, creator_id, maic_source_id, audit_status, status, visible_scope, remark, create_time, update_time FROM jst_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT course_id, course_name, course_type, cover_image, CASE WHEN description IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(description) > 60 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(description, 1, 60), '...') ELSE description END AS description, price, points_price FROM jst_course
del_flag = '0' AND audit_status = 'approved' AND status = 'on'
AND course_type = #{courseType}
ORDER BY update_time DESC, course_id DESC
SELECT course_id, course_name, course_type, cover_image, description, price, points_price FROM jst_course WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT c.course_id, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.cover_image, l.progress, l.duration_seconds, l.complete_status, l.complete_time FROM jst_course_learn_record l INNER JOIN jst_course c ON c.course_id = l.course_id AND c.del_flag = '0' WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY l.update_time DESC, l.learn_id DESC
